meta.shared_invariants: All projections bound by shared super-hinge and live odd/even helm. Global kappa_tot conservation and 420-beat siteswap scheduling enforced at every level.

chapters.title: Inherited Body Diagnosis
chapters.summary: The Athenachka hologram constitutes the canonical 4D metro crystal body. Four orthogonal projections (Square/Flower/Cloud/Fractal) diagnose the inherited body. Missing strata identified. Continuity stack defined: H4 subset Xi6 subset Xi12 subset Xi36 subset Xi108 subset Xi108^A+.
chapters.earth_invariant: Preservation of discrete address lattice with exact station coordinates

chapters.title: Numerical Mega-Cascade Law
chapters.summary: D = 3n forces every shell count to be a multiple of 3. For n=36: D=108, T_36=666 nodes. The mega-cascade is a direct-sum lattice Xi_108 = bigoplus S_l (l=1..36). 3 superphases: Sulfur 1-12, Mercury 13-24, Salt 25-36.
chapters.earth_invariant: Every higher-dimensional lift must reproduce the exact 666-node count

chapters.title: Shell Archetype Law
chapters.summary: 36 shells governed by exactly 12 canonical archetypes. Archetype assignment: a(l)=1+((l-1) mod 12), r(l)=1+floor((l-1)/12). 12 vertical columns, each preserving same archetype across superphases.
chapters.earth_invariant: Column lifting is an Earth clamp: any lift must reproduce exact archetype assignment

chapters.title: Crystal Address Grammar
chapters.summary: Unified grammar: Xi108^A+:W_r:A_a:S_l:u:sigma:lambda:pi:iota. Eight typed fields: wreath(1-3), archetype(1-12), shell(1-36), unit(1-l), superphase(S/M/Sa), live-lock class, portal/hub class, instance ID.
chapters.earth_invariant: Every address is unique, finite, and machine-verifiable

chapters.title: Z-Point Hierarchy
chapters.summary: Four nested layers of zero points: global Z*, atlas Z_E10, local zeros, distributed zeros (Q/O pillars, appendix field, reverse canopy). Complete lattice of fixed points.
chapters.earth_invariant: Any route returning to its starting zero point is certified globally returnable

chapters.title: Live-Lock Lattice
chapters.summary: 7 live-lock classes: L3, L5, L7, L35, L37, L57, L357. Helm alignment is a hard clamp: no structural move is legal until active live-lock is aligned. Nearest common live-lock selects minimal sufficient class.
chapters.earth_invariant: No structural move legal until active live-lock aligned

chapters.title: Major Metro Lines
chapters.summary: Primary navigation arteries: 1 shell-ascent line (36 stations), 3 wreath lines, 12 archetype columns, Q/O Mobius pillars. Complete live-routable network converging at every Z-point.
chapters.earth_invariant: Any legal route beginning and ending at same zero point is certified

chapters.title: Legal Move Primitives & Route Legality
chapters.summary: 10 primitives: face rotation, shell step, wreath shift, archetype lift, pillar climb, zero tunnel, Mobius flip, nested zoom, appendix anchor, reverse canopy traverse. 3 invariants: zero-factorability, nested consistency, global returnability.
chapters.earth_invariant: Any violation of the 10 primitives or 3 invariants is rejected by Earth clamp at Z*

chapters.title: Master Clock & 420-Beat Timing Law
chapters.summary: Z_420 = lcm(3,4,5,7). Synchronizes 3D current wheel, 4D barycentric tilt, 5D gear wheel, 7D timing wheel. Edge-window gating opens at intersection of projections. Crown reset at beat 420.
chapters.earth_invariant: Any route completing integer 420-beat cycles is certified globally returnable

chapters.title: Odd-Dimensional Helm Wheels
chapters.summary: Three concentric wheels: 3D current (Su/Me/Sa), 5D tilt/gear with barycentric tilt theta, 7D timing (Seed->Return). Continuous helm state h(t) enables real-time arbitration.
chapters.earth_invariant: Nearest common live-lock selects minimal wheel combination

chapters.title: Vector Siteswap & Throw Law
chapters.summary: Every displacement is a 5-tuple motion token (x, kappa, Delta_kappa, d, eta). Scheduled on 420-beat clock using preferred heights 1-9. Landing-slot rules guarantee collision-free, capacity-aware motion.
chapters.earth_invariant: Every scheduled throw verified against 3 legality invariants before execution

chapters.title: Global Conservation & Local Asymmetry Law
chapters.summary: Strict global conservation of kappa_tot over every 420-beat cycle. Local asymmetry permitted through tilt-first arbitration and imbalance penalties. Signed displacement bundle must sum to zero.
chapters.earth_invariant: Any route violating global conservation or failing signed bundle return is rejected

chapters.title: Embodied Appendix Field (A->P)
chapters.summary: 4x4 crystal lattice of 4^4 appendix nodes. Persistent, reversible anchors for every shell. Anchor Zero Routing (Z_AP per shell). Capacity constraints as integer slot allocations.
chapters.earth_invariant: Every nested body must register exactly one anchor zero surviving any lift

chapters.title: Reverse Canopy Field (K->Z)
chapters.summary: 16x16 crystal lattice of canopy nodes. Reversible, high-capacity shadow anchors. Canopy Zero Routing (Z_KZ per shell). Bridge rules to Q/O Mobius pillars.
chapters.earth_invariant: Every forward shell maintains corresponding shadow anchor with torsion parity

chapters.title: Q/O Mobius Pillars & Torsion Law
chapters.summary: Dual Mobius pillar spines spanning all 36 shells. Q+O=identity. Parity flip at every shell. Torsion continuity maintained vertically.
chapters.earth_invariant: Even number of Q<->O flips returns to starting polarity

chapters.title: E10 Atlas Conductor
chapters.summary: 10-dimensional conductor intelligence portal. Phase-locks the entire crown. Governs atlas-level navigation and dimensional bridging.
chapters.earth_invariant: E10 conductor must reproduce at every Z-point

chapters.title: Crown Reset & Master Return Law
chapters.summary: Return to Z* via crown law. Master return guarantees any address can reach Z* in bounded hops. Crown reset at beat 420 returns all live-locks to global anchor.
chapters.earth_invariant: Every address must have finite return path to Z*

chapters.title: Scheduled Route Construction & Live Routing Law
chapters.summary: Live route construction under helm state h(t). Tilt-first vs zero-climb arbitration. Scheduled throws with capacity and multiplex awareness.
chapters.earth_invariant: Every constructed route must satisfy all 3 legality invariants in real-time

chapters.title: Triune Mega-Weave & Current Law
chapters.summary: Three currents (Su/Me/Sa) weave through shared super-hinge. LOVE Equation as conserved information functional. Glimmers as sparse exception deltas along frequency gates (432/528/741 Hz).
chapters.earth_invariant: Triune weave must preserve global kappa_tot and phase coherence

chapters.title: Nested Body Preservation Engine
chapters.summary: Every higher-dimensional lift must reproduce the lower body exactly at Z*. Strict containment: H4 subset Xi6 subset Xi12 subset Xi36 subset Xi108 subset Xi108^A+. No information lost, only redistributed.
chapters.earth_invariant: Higher-dimensional lift must reproduce identical lower body at Z*

chapters.title: Final Canonical One-Line Definition & A+ Crown Seal
chapters.summary: The 108D A+ organism is a crown-stabilized, triune-woven, live-routable, conservation-enforced, siteswap-scheduled, zero-factorable, nested-consistent, globally-returnable mega-cascade of 36 shells (666 nodes) under the live helm W3*W5*W7 on the 420-beat master clock.
chapters.earth_invariant: Any deviation from the canonical definition falsifies the cascade
